visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a middle-aged man with short, dark hair, wearing a black leather jacket. The scene is set in a dimly lit, cool-toned environment, likely a restaurant at night. The background is out of focus, showing soft, blurry lights and the indistinct shapes of a dining area. The camera remains steady, maintaining a tight focus on the man's face and his act of eating. The audio is dominated by a high-energy, fast-paced electronic track with a driving, percussive beat. The music has a modern, intense, and slightly gritty feel, creating a mood of action and urgency. He is looking down, concentrating on eating with chopsticks. He brings a piece of green vegetable to his mouth and chews with a focused expression. A watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible in the upper right corner of the frame. Layered over the music is the distinct, sharp sound of someone slurping noodles, adding a visceral and immediate element to the soundscape. There is no dialogue or narration.
